---
title: "First Principles"
subtitle: "The things nobody explained but everyone assumes you know"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  include:
    categories: "{first-principles}"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
---

```{=html}
<div class="pp-series-hero">
  <span class="pp-series-badge badge-a">Series A</span>
  <p class="pp-series-intro">
    Big words. Small foundations. Every post in this series takes one concept that students use confidently without truly understanding, and rebuilds it from the ground up. One concept per post. No prerequisites except curiosity.
  </p>
  <div class="pp-series-nav">
    <a href="index.html">← All Series</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
